belier.intro: Thursday, the day of Jupiter, opens a more expansive page for you, dear Aries. The Sun moves freshly into Gemini through your zone of exchanges and stimulates your speech and your curiosity. The waxing Moon in Leo lights up your zone of creativity and romance, leaving you visibly radiant.
belier.love: Your charm catches fire today, you can risk a lively and playful gesture. If you are partnered, an improvised romantic moment can rekindle a sleeping spark. If you are single, an encounter in a playful setting, a party, an outing or a shared hobby, can pleasantly surprise your heart.
belier.work: Mars your ruler supports your creativity, you can defend an original idea with conviction. A conversation, a message or a presentation prepared yesterday can produce its effect today. Avoid monopolizing the floor, listening remains your true leverage in this new solar cycle.
belier.energy: Your heart and your head enjoy a bit of joyful movement, dancing, brisk walking or outdoor play. Drink enough water, your inner fire needs fluidity to stay creative.
belier.intuition: Your inspiration is more direct and joyful today, catch its clear impulses without overthinking. A burst of laughter or a spontaneous game can teach you more than a long reflection.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Sun leaves your sign and begins its course in Gemini through your zone of resources, dear Taurus. Venus, your ruler, stays in Gemini and supports a patient reflection on what holds true value for you. The waxing Moon in Leo bathes your home zone in an enveloping warmth.
taureau.love: Your need for tenderness looks for a comfortable and warm setting today. If you are partnered, sharing a carefully prepared meal at home can strengthen your bond in a simple and honest way. If you are single, an encounter in a family context or around a home project can awaken your interest.
taureau.work: You have the chance to examine your income, your contracts or your tools with a calm clarity. A budget reviewed at a steady pace can bring you a real sense of freedom. Avoid making an impulsive purchase today, take time to compare or to sleep on it for a night.
taureau.energy: Your throat and your digestion enjoy a warm meal taken seated and quiet. Care for your neck, stretch it gently several times during the day to free your voice.
taureau.intuition: Your body speaks clearly today about what nourishes you and what weighs you down. One simple sensation can illuminate a material choice more than a detailed list.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Sun enters your sign, dear Gemini, and inaugurates your new personal season. Mercury, your ruler, supports your liveliness of mind on this expansive Jupiter day. The waxing Moon in Leo through your zone of close exchanges puts warmth into all your conversations.
gemeaux.love: Your aura brightens and attracts kind glances today. If you are partnered, expressing a desire for renewal can open a stimulating and joyful discussion. If you are single, an affinity born from a joyful conversation, a quick message or a shared ride, can take shape faster than expected.
gemeaux.work: You can set a clear intention for this new solar cycle starting in your sign. A presentation, a pitch or a well crafted message can move a stalled project forward. You have the chance to make yourself better heard without saying everything in one go.
gemeaux.energy: Your arms, your hands and your breath enjoy a bit of fresh air and conscious breathing. A gentle tea recenters you between exchanges and soothes your quick mind.
gemeaux.intuition: Your mind is fast, but your heart also has a strong voice today. An idea that keeps coming back deserves to be written down and listened to rather than filed away too soon.
gemeaux.mantra: I allow myself a new breath
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun enters Gemini through your zone of retreat and inner life, dear Cancer. The Moon, your ruler, waxing in Leo through your zone of resources highlights what truly nourishes you. Today's Jupiter adds generosity to your feeling and softens your reading of the week ahead.
cancer.love: Your heart warms gently when it hears a sincere sign of affection. If you are partnered, daring to name a shared material need can ease a recent tension. If you are single, you may be surprised by a concrete attention, a modest gift or a service rendered with care.
cancer.work: You have the chance to review your rates, your budget or your personal finances with more clarity. A financial intuition that has been forming for a few days deserves your kind attention. Avoid however committing to a long term investment today, leave room to reread it calmly.
cancer.energy: Your stomach and your chest welcome warm, comforting food. Protect your sleep, your emotional reservoir recharges at night more than at any other hour.
cancer.intuition: Your dreams still carry the imprint of a warm Moon, keep a notebook close by. An image around money, the home or a beloved object can illuminate a decision on hold.
cancer.mantra: I offer myself what I am truly worth
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The waxing Moon travels through your sign today, dear Leo, and amplifies your natural solar presence. The Sun enters Gemini through your zone of friendships and benevolent circles. Today's Jupiter invites your natural generosity to unfold without excess and without seeking applause.
lion.love: You radiate a particularly vivid and warm charm today. If you are partnered, a shared friendship project with your inner circle can deepen your bond in an unexpected way. If you are single, an encounter in a friendly or collective setting can take a tenderer shade than anticipated.
lion.work: You have the chance to present an idea to a group and find precious allies there. A professional friendship can bring you concrete support on a visible project. Avoid however seeking approval at any cost, your inner compass remains your best guide.
lion.energy: Your heart enjoys a joyful rhythm and a soft bath of light in the middle of the day. Hydrate regularly, your inner fire needs water to shine without burning out.
lion.intuition: Your personal Moon speaks loudly today, listen for the subtle behind the grand. An emotion that crosses you in the presence of friends carries an important truth not to be brushed aside.
lion.mantra: I shine by sharing my light
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Sun enters Gemini through your professional zone, dear Virgo, and highlights your reputation and your positioning. Mercury, your ruler, supports your precision on this expansive Jupiter day. The waxing Moon in Leo through your zone of retreat still asks for a little inner softness.
vierge.love: Your heart opens in silence today, without publicity or display. If you are partnered, a discreet attention can convey more affection than a long prepared speech. If you are single, an attraction that develops away from public eyes can bring you an unexpected sweetness.
vierge.work: You have the chance to advance an important professional step, an application, a mission or a public talk. A file patiently prepared can meet a favorable echo this week. Avoid haste, your sense of detail is your best asset in this new solar cycle.
vierge.energy: Your intestines enjoy simple cooking and quiet chewing at the table. Protect your sleep and your moments of retreat, your nervous system silently calls for them.
vierge.intuition: What matures in silence today takes root for a long time. An image that returns at rest is often worth more than a long, overly rational analysis.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Sun enters Gemini through your zone of broader horizons, dear Libra, and opens your desire for discovery. Venus, your ruler, in Gemini supports your thirst for learning and travel. The waxing Moon in Leo through your zone of friendships pleasantly warms your social ties.
balance.love: Your heart lights up at the touch of new ideas and shared perspectives. If you are partnered, talking about a trip or a learning project together can revive your bond. If you are single, an encounter in a cultural, intellectual or international setting can awaken your interest in a lasting way.
balance.work: You have the chance to explore a course, a distant partnership or a publication. A professional friendship can open an unexpected door in a field you observed from afar. Keep your usual sense of nuance, it makes the whole difference in your negotiations.
balance.energy: Your kidneys and lower back enjoy a walk in the open air at the end of the day. A warm drink in the morning balances your nervous system and supports your concentration.
balance.intuition: Your intuition widens today, welcome thoughts that exceed you a little. A book opened at random or a sentence overheard in a cafe can carry a real message.
balance.mantra: I widen my horizon with grace
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Sun enters Gemini through your zone of shared resources, dear Scorpio, and asks you to look at the flows of exchange with clarity. Pluto continues its patient, deep work behind the scenes. The waxing Moon in Leo through your professional zone places your presence in public light.
scorpion.love: Your magnetism remains intact, accompanied today by a more solar and warmer note. If you are partnered, talking about material or financial commitment can clarify the trust between you. If you are single, an attraction denser than usual can reveal itself in a professional or public setting.
scorpion.work: You have the chance to position yourself with authority on a visible project this week. A question of investment, inheritance or profit sharing can move forward through a direct word. Avoid however playing too subtle a game, clarity will serve you better than pure strategy today.
scorpion.energy: Your lower back and pelvis ask for a bit of gentle stretching in the morning. Hydrate more than usual to support your intense inner work.
scorpion.intuition: Your strategic flair remains sharp, but today your visibility adds a new dimension to your readings. What you sense when you step into a room is worth more than a full report.
scorpion.mantra: I transform with both light and depth
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Sun enters Gemini through your zone of committed relationships, dear Sagittarius, and emphasizes your partnerships. Jupiter, your ruler, fully supports you on this day dedicated to him. The waxing Moon in Leo through your zone of broader horizons feeds your natural taste for adventure.
sagittaire.love: Your charm broadens and is enriched with a real warmth of heart. If you are partnered, a project together oriented toward travel or learning can take a concrete shape. If you are single, an encounter in a setting of discovery or study can excite you more than you imagined.
sagittaire.work: You have the chance to establish an important partnership or to clarify the terms of a long standing collaboration. A signal from a resource person deserves to be listened to seriously today. Avoid however your usual scattering, choose the alliance that truly resembles you.
sagittaire.energy: Your thighs and pelvis enjoy moderate, joyful physical activity. A bit of sunlight on your face gently recharges you and supports your natural optimism.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition pairs with a particularly fine sense of opportunity today. What presents itself with simplicity and clarity can carry far tomorrow or next week.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Sun enters Gemini through your zone of daily life and work, dear Capricorn, and invites you to revisit your routines. Saturn, your ruler, supports your usual seriousness on this Jupiter day. The waxing Moon in Leo through your zone of deep commitments brings warmth to an intimate question.
capricorne.love: You can express a deep attachment through a concrete daily gesture rather than through grand words. If you are partnered, sharing a practical task can weave an almost sacred intimacy. If you are single, an attraction born in a professional or athletic setting can carry more weight than expected.
capricorne.work: You have the chance to improve a routine, a tool or a protocol that has silently cost you for too long. An administrative question can find an outcome through a precise exchange with the right person. Stay attentive to your body, your efficiency depends on your inner balance today.
capricorne.energy: Your joints and your knees enjoy a gentle warm up before any physical effort. Carefully protect your sleep, your vitality is built in your quietest hours.
capricorne.intuition: What your body refuses today carries precious information to receive without judgment. A discreet physical signal can save you from a useless scattering in the coming days.
capricorne.mantra: My daily life builds my depth
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Sun enters Gemini through your creative and romantic zone, dear Aquarius, and lights up your personal expression. Uranus, your modern ruler, continues its work but the day calls more for spontaneous joy. The waxing Moon in Leo through your zone of committed relationships warms your closest bonds.
verseau.love: Your charm blossoms in joy and play today without particular effort. If you are partnered, a shared artistic moment, a concert, an exhibition or a film, can revive your long built complicity. If you are single, an encounter in a playful or creative setting can take a surprisingly tender shade.
verseau.work: You have the chance to dare a project more creative than your usual style, warmer and more embodied. A collaboration with a warm hearted person can bring you a real source of inspiration. Avoid however over intellectualizing your impulse, follow your pleasure too today.
verseau.energy: Your heart and your ankles enjoy a light, joyful activity, without a race to performance. A warm drink in the morning balances your moods and supports your bodily grounding.
verseau.intuition: Your usual genius lets itself be touched today by a softer, more human light. A burst of spontaneous enthusiasm is worth more than a long, well built theory.
verseau.mantra: My originality also expresses itself through tenderness
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Sun enters Gemini through your home zone, dear Pisces, and highlights your intimate and family base. Neptune, your ruler, continues its dreamy passage in an energy that also asks for a bit of concrete clarity. The waxing Moon in Leo through your zone of daily life supports a precise care for your routines.
poissons.love: Your heart looks for a nest more than for adventures today. If you are partnered, attention brought to your living space can strengthen your shared sense of security. If you are single, an encounter in a family or domestic setting can move you gently and lastingly.
poissons.work: You have the chance to organize your workspace, your computer or your files to gain in clarity. A routine adjusted today can bring you lightness for the whole week ahead. Avoid however scattering yourself, choose a single space to tidy up today.
poissons.energy: Your feet and your lymphatic system enjoy a quiet walk at the end of the day. Carefully protect your sleep, your sensitivity finds its truest rest there.
poissons.intuition: Your feelings linked to your home or your lineage carry an accurate message today. An image returning around a parent deserves to be welcomed without drama or haste.
poissons.mantra: My home is my source of peace
poissons.author: Sibylle
